## How you tested it
Be specific about what you did and what you saw. "Builds clean" is not testing.

- [ ] Tested with a video **playing**, **paused**, the tab **closed**, and Chrome **quit**
- [ ] Tested with **multiple YouTube tabs** open
- [ ] Tested **clicking the preview** to focus the tab
- **What you did and what you saw:**

## Checklist
- [ ] I built off the latest `main`.
- [ ] One focused change, not a bundle of unrelated edits.
- [ ] Screenshot or short screen recording attached for any visual or timing change.
- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md and this fits the scope.
